{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/items/textures/selection_wand.png
}}
The selection wand is a creative-only tool that can be used to select areas of blocks for use in commands.


== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
The selection wand appears to be made of [[Silver Ingot|silver]], with a [[ruby]] on the lower end, and on the upper end, a dark blue gem not seen elsewhere in Cubyz.
[[Category:Items]]
